financial_metrics.title: Financial Metrics
financial_metrics.label: Excellent
bullets: The company is doing really well, making more money and growing faster than others in its field.
They are investing wisely in areas like technology, which should help them keep growing in the future.

risk_intelligence.title: Risk Intelligence
risk_intelligence.label: Well Managed
bullets: The company is doing a good job managing risks by keeping prices steady and borrowing money to strengthen its finances.
There is a moderate risk because they need to handle upcoming debt carefully and stay updated with new rules that might change.

esg.title: ESG Analysis
esg.label: Good
bullets: The company is doing well in managing its leadership and decision-making processes.
There is room for improvement in how the company handles social issues like community and employee relations.

speaker_sentiment.title: Speaker Sentiment
speaker_sentiment.label: Excellent
bullets: The company's leaders spoke confidently about their strong financial health and future plans.
Even when asked tough questions, they stayed positive and sure about their market position.

qa_transparency.title: Q&A Transparency
qa_transparency.label: Poor
bullets: The company didn't give clear details about their future plans or numbers.
Their answers were often too general, making it hard to understand their exact strategies.

overall_sentiment.title: Overall Sentiment
overall_sentiment.label: Excellent
bullets: The company is doing well and growing in important areas, which is a good sign for future success.
They are careful about potential problems in the world, but they have a plan to keep growing safely.

investment_synthesis.title: Investment Synthesis
investment_synthesis.label: Good
bullets: HDFC Life is doing well because it's selling more policies and making more money from each one.
The company is growing its share of the market, but new rules could make it harder to keep profits high.
